summary: OtoEkspertiz AI MVP tested end-to-end (backend + frontend). Backend: 13/14 pytest cases passing; the single failure was a test-assertion issue (backend correctly lowercases emails on register/login — proper behavior, no backend bug). All critical endpoints working including auth (register/login/me), /analyze (real Gemini 2.5 Pro call returned full structured JSON with all required fields, traffic-light seviye values valid), /history, /reports/{id}, favorites add/list/ids/remove, and /compare with winners. Frontend: login → tabs navigation works, search screen with popular selection populates fields, Analizi Başlat triggers real ~15s Gemini analysis and navigates to /report/{id} showing full report (guven_skoru=92 for Toyota Corolla 2018, ozet, tavsiye, all issue categories rendered via testIDs issue-*, maint-*), compare tab renders picker, favorites tab shows Favoriler (0) and Geçmiş (4) tabs, profile shows user info and logout works.

issues: Profile screen displays 'AI Modeli: Gemini 3.1 Pro' but backend actually uses gemini-2.5-pro (server.py line 260). Update the label to 'Gemini 2.5 Pro' for accuracy.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — cosmetic RN Web deprecation, not blocking.

action_items: Fix 'Gemini 3.1 Pro' label on /app/frontend/app/(app)/(tabs)/profile.tsx → change to 'Gemini 2.5 Pro' to match backend model.
Optional: silence pointerEvents deprecation warnings by migrating from prop to style.pointerEvents in any custom RN component that uses it.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider migrating to lifespan context manager (non-blocking).

CORS is set to allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True — this combination is disallowed by browsers per CORS spec; may cause issues if credentials are ever used. Currently JWT is sent in Authorization header (not cookies), so this works, but tighten for production.
JWT_SECRET default in .env is a well-known string; note comment says 'change-in-production-2026' — fine for MVP.
Register endpoint returns 409 on duplicate email but relies on the unique index too; race condition possible under concurrency (minor).

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 real failures; 1 test-assertion fix needed on our side)

seed_data_creation: During testing, 2 additional analysis reports (Toyota Corolla 2018, Honda Civic 2019) were created under test@oto.com for compare/history validation. Test user history now shows ~4 reports.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. Only cosmetic frontend fix needed (Gemini version label in profile). Test credentials: test@oto.com / test123. Analyze endpoint takes 10-30s (real Gemini call). Report screen testIDs: close-report, toggle-fav, issue-{CATEGORY}-{index}, maint-{index}. Compare screen: pick-1, pick-2, run-compare. Favorites: tab-fav, tab-hist. Profile: logout-btn.
rca_of_issue: None. No critical bugs. The one failing pytest case (test_register_new_user) is a test-side email casing assertion — backend correctly normalizes email to lowercase on both register and login, which is proper behavior (email uniqueness). No code fix needed on backend.
